languages.text: "Я не знаю и не хочу знать!" {n}Громовой бинарный вопль-молитва Альвы перекрывает шум ветра.{/n} "Священная добывающая станция Тиркуаз-4 заражена, долгие циклы ксеноскверна мучала ее машинный дух. Мы упокоим и освободим ее — этого достаточно".

"I do not know and I do not want to know!" {n}Alva's thunderous binharic howl-prayer carries over the roar of the wind.{/n} "The sacred mining station of Tirkuaz-4 is contaminated, long cycles of xenocorruption have tormented her machine spirit. We soothe and free it — that is enough."
languages.original_text: "Я не знаю и не хочу знать!" {n}Громовой бинарный вопль-молитва Альвы перекрывает шум ветра.{/n} "Священная добывающая станция Тиркуаз-4 заражена, долгие циклы ксеноскверна мучала ее машинный дух. Мы упокоим и освободим ее — этого достаточно".

traits.locale_text: "I do not know and I do not want to know!" {n}Alva's thunderous binharic howl-prayer carries over the roar of the wind.{/n} "The sacred mining station of Tirkuaz-4 is contaminated, long cycles of xenocorruption have tormented her machine spirit. We soothe and free it — that is enough."

"I do not know and I do not want to know!" {n}Alva's thunderous binharic howl-prayer carries over the roar of the wind.{/n} "The sacred mining station of Tirkuaz-4 is contaminated, long cycles of xenocorruption have tormented her machine spirit. We soothe and free it — that is enough."

"I do not know and I do not want to know!" {n}Alva's thunderous binharic howl-prayer carries over the roar of the wind.{/n} "The sacred mining station of Tirkuaz-4 is contaminated, long cycles of xenocorruption have tormented her machine spirit. We soothe and free it — that is enough."

languages.text: 「知らないし、知りたいとも思わない！」{n}アルヴァの轟くようなビンハリックの祈りは、風雨の轟きを上回る.{/n}「聖なる採掘基地のティルクアズ-4が汚染された。異種汚染の長いサイクルが機械霊を苦しめた。慰め、解放する。それが十分だ」
languages.original_text: "I do not know and I do not want to know!" {n}Alva's thunderous binharic howl-prayer carries over the roar of the wind.{/n} "The sacred mining station of Tirkuaz-4 is contaminated, long cycles of xenocorruption have tormented her machine spirit. We soothe and free it — that is enough."

traits.locale_text: 「知らないし、知りたいとも思わない！」{n}アルヴァの轟くようなビンハリックの祈りは、風雨の轟きを上回る.{/n}「聖なる採掘基地のティルクアズ-4が汚染された。異種汚染の長いサイクルが機械霊を苦しめた。慰め、解放する。それが十分だ。」

languages.text: «¡Ni lo sé ni quiero saberlo!». {n}El aullido de la plegaria en binario de Alva se eleva sobre el rugido del viento.{/n} «La sagrada estación minera de Tirkuaz 4 ha sido contaminada. Largos ciclos de xenocorrupción han atormentado su espíritu máquina. Lo apaciguaremos y liberaremos. Con eso tendrá que bastar».
languages.original_text: "I do not know and I do not want to know!" {n}Alva's thunderous binharic howl-prayer carries over the roar of the wind.{/n} "The sacred mining station of Tirkuaz-4 is contaminated, long cycles of xenocorruption have tormented her machine spirit. We soothe and free it — that is enough."

traits.locale_text: «¡Ni lo sé ni quiero saberlo!». {n}El aullido de la plegaria en binario de Alva se eleva sobre el rugido del viento.{/n} «La sagrada estación minera de Tirkuaz 4 ha sido contaminada. Largos ciclos de xenocorrupción han atormentado su espíritu máquina. Lo apaciguaremos y liberaremos. Con eso tendrá que bastar».

languages.text: “我不知道，也不想知道！”{n}阿尔瓦雷鸣般的二进制嚎叫祷词盖过了风声。{/n}“神圣的提库阿兹4号采矿站已被污染，长期的异形腐蚀周期折磨着她的机魂。我们安抚并解放它——这就够了。”
languages.original_text: "I do not know and I do not want to know!" {n}Alva's thunderous binharic howl-prayer carries over the roar of the wind.{/n} "The sacred mining station of Tirkuaz-4 is contaminated, long cycles of xenocorruption have tormented her machine spirit. We soothe and free it — that is enough."

traits.locale_text: “我不知道，也不想知道！”{n}阿尔瓦雷鸣般的二进制嚎叫祷词盖过了风声。{/n}“神圣的提库阿兹4号采矿站已被污染，长期的异形腐蚀周期折磨着她的机魂。我们安抚并解放它——这就够了。”

languages.text: "Das weiß ich nicht und ich will es auch gar nicht wissen!" {n}Alvas dröhnendes binhärisches Gebetsgeheul übertönt selbst den tosenden Wind.{/n} "Die heilige Minenstation Tirkuaz-4 ist kontaminiert. Lange Zyklen von Xenokorruption haben ihren Maschinengeist gequält. Wir besänftigen und befreien ihn ... das reicht."
languages.original_text: "I do not know and I do not want to know!" {n}Alva's thunderous binharic howl-prayer carries over the roar of the wind.{/n} "The sacred mining station of Tirkuaz-4 is contaminated, long cycles of xenocorruption have tormented her machine spirit. We soothe and free it — that is enough."

traits.locale_text: "Das weiß ich nicht und ich will es auch gar nicht wissen!" {n}Alvas dröhnendes binhärisches Gebetsgeheul übertönt selbst den tosenden Wind.{/n} "Die heilige Minenstation Tirkuaz-4 ist kontaminiert. Lange Zyklen von Xenokorruption haben ihren Maschinengeist gequält. Wir besänftigen und befreien ihn ... das reicht."

languages.text: "Bilmiyorum, bilmek de istemiyorum!" {n}Alva'nın gök gürültüsünü andıran ikilidil duası, rüzgârın uğultusunu bastırıyor.{/n} "Tirkuaz-4'ün kutsal maden istasyonu kirlendi, uzun döngüler süren zeno yozlaşması, makine ruhuna azap çektirdi. Onu yatıştırıp özgürleştireceğiz. Bu kadarı yeterli."
languages.original_text: "I do not know and I do not want to know!" {n}Alva's thunderous binharic howl-prayer carries over the roar of the wind.{/n} "The sacred mining station of Tirkuaz-4 is contaminated, long cycles of xenocorruption have tormented her machine spirit. We soothe and free it — that is enough."

traits.locale_text: "Bilmiyorum, bilmek de istemiyorum!" {n}Alva'nın gök gürültüsünü andıran ikilidil duası, rüzgârın uğultusunu bastırıyor.{/n} "Tirkuaz-4'ün kutsal maden istasyonu kirlendi, uzun döngüler süren zeno yozlaşması, makine ruhuna azap çektirdi. Onu yatıştırıp özgürleştireceğiz. Bu kadarı yeterli."

languages.text: « Je l'ignore, et je ne veux pas le savoir ! » {n}La prière binhaire tonitruante d'Alva couvre même le rugissement du vent.{/n} « La station minière sacrée de Tirkuaz-4 est contaminée. Son esprit de la machine a été bien trop tourmenté par de longs cycles de xénocorruption. Nous l'apaisons et le libérons, et c'est bien suffisant. »
languages.original_text: "I do not know and I do not want to know!" {n}Alva's thunderous binharic howl-prayer carries over the roar of the wind.{/n} "The sacred mining station of Tirkuaz-4 is contaminated, long cycles of xenocorruption have tormented her machine spirit. We soothe and free it — that is enough."

traits.locale_text: « Je l'ignore, et je ne veux pas le savoir ! » {n}La prière binhaire tonitruante d'Alva couvre même le rugissement du vent.{/n} « La station minière sacrée de Tirkuaz-4 est contaminée. Son esprit de la machine a été bien trop tourmenté par de longs cycles de xénocorruption. Nous l'apaisons et le libérons, et c'est bien suffisant. »
